name: @kirrosh/apitool
description: API testing platform — define tests in YAML, run from CLI or WebUI, generate from OpenAPI specs

scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:mocked
scripts.test:unit: bun test tests/db/ tests/parser/ tests/runner/ tests/generator/ tests/cli/args.test.ts tests/cli/chat.test.ts tests/cli/commands.test.ts tests/cli/doctor.test.ts tests/cli/envs.test.ts tests/cli/generate-env.test.ts tests/cli/init.test.ts tests/cli/runs.test.ts tests/cli/safe-run.test.ts tests/cli/update.test.ts tests/integration/ tests/web/
